video_id: DISTRACTION ｜ One Minute Film Competition by Sony Indonesia.mp4.mp3
transcript: Why? Why do I feel lost? Why does the time slip from my fingers like sand? Leaving me entangled in this relentless demands of reality. This is like the life that I dreamt of. Expressing my imagination through painting. But why? Why does it feel like I don't have time to pursue my dreams? What is wrong with me?

timestamps.text: Why? Why do I feel lost? Why does the time slip from my fingers like sand?

Leaving me entangled in this relentless demands of reality. This is like the life that I dreamt of. Expressing my imagination through painting. But why? Why does it feel like I don't have time to pursue my dreams?
